creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Check that your dependencies are fully up-to-date, in particular 
your iconv port. 

gnomevfs builds just fine on both my testboxes here and on the 
bento package building cluster - point your browser at 
http://bento.FreeBSD.org/errorlogs/4-full/ for more details. 

So this looks like a localized problem.
